allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./lib/data/properties.json''\); console.log\(''Total records:'', d.length\); console.log\(''Last record:'', JSON.stringify\(d[d.length-1], null, 2\)\); console.log\(''First record:'', JSON.stringify\(d[0], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./lib/data/properties.json''\); const withEquity = d.filter\(r => ''estimated_equity'' in r\); const withOwnerName = d.filter\(r => ''owner_name'' in r\); console.log\(''With estimated_equity:'', withEquity.length\); console.log\(''With owner_name:'', withOwnerName.length\); console.log\(''Sample with equity:'', JSON.stringify\(withEquity[0], null, 2\)\);")
